characters.name: Character Appearances
characters.description: This article contains spoilers that donotviolate ourspoiler policy. These charts list theappearances of all charactersthat have appeared in three or more episodes (extras not included). Unless credited, non-physical appearances such as photographs are not listed. We're also excluding archive footage appearances.

characters.name: Antihero
characters.description: InThe Vampire Diaries Universe, theantiheroeshave a very important role in the storyline, as their actions and stories have a great impact on the protagonists and antagonists. An antihero (sometimes antiheroine as the feminine) is generally considered to be a protagonist whose personality can be perceived as being villainous and heroic at the same time, in contrast to the more perpetually noble characteristics of an archetypal hero or the perpetually immoral characteristics of an archetypal villain. They are generally expected to be more physically attractive, stronger, braver, cleverer or more charismatic. Unlikely heroes are simply characters who may not be conspicuously flawed, but simply ordinary people thrust into extraordinary circumstances.

characters.description: This is the list of thedeceased/destroyedcharacters on theThe Vampire Diaries,The Originals, andLegaciesuniverse.

characters.name: The Vampire Diaries Universe Deceased

characters.name: Abigail
characters.description: AbigailBiographical informationBorn1994/1995(Age 17)StatusDeceased(FoundPeace[1])OccupationHigh School Student(Formerly)Member of theFrench Quarter Coven(Formerly)Harvest Witch(Formerly)Member ofThe Ancestors(Formerly)SpeciesWitchAncestral Spirit(Formerly)GenderFemaleSupernatural informationSignificant spellsFlower Revival SpellChannelingthe Ancestors(twice)Ancestral Séance Spell(withDavina)TelekinesisAncestral Illusory Spell(withthe Ancestors)Defense Spell(withMonique)Cause of deathThroat slit(1st time)Impaled(2nd time)Killed byBastianna Natale(1st time)Klaus Mikaelson(2nd time)Physical appearanceHeight5'4"Hair colorBlondeEye colorBlueAppearancePlayed byAubrey DeVaney(as Harvest Girl #2)Alexa YeamesEpisode Count6First seenSinners and Saints(Flashback)Last seenFrom a Cradle to a Grave Abigailwas awitchwho first appeared in thefifth episodeof thefirst seasonofThe Originals. She was chosen by theFrench Quarter CovenElderBastianna Nataleas one ofHarvest girlsto participate inthe Harvest ritual. However, the ritual was delayed and she spent over a year withthe Ancestorson theAncestral Plane. She was eventuallyresurrectedafter the completion of the Harvest withGenevieveas the new coven leader. InFrom a Cradle to a Grave, she was murdered byNiklaus Mikaelsonduring a failed attempt to sacrifice and consecrateHopeonEsther Mikaelson's orders. Nothing is known about Abigail’s history prior to being selected as the French Quarter Coven’s Harvest witch. She was friends withMonique Deveraux,Cassie, andDavina Claire. During the Harvest Ritual, she and her friends, except Davina, were sacrificed and the three of them spent their time withthe Ancestorson theAncestral Plane. Much of Abigail's personality remains unexplored, though following her resurrection, she seemed to have been unchanged, as opposed to Monique. Despite Davina's sacrifice significantly delayed the Harvest and her resurrection, she still treated Davina kindly and helped her with her confidence, such as when she attempted to revive a dead rose. However, she was still very loyal to the Ancestors and was willing to help sacrifice Hope in the name of the coven.

characters.name: Ablah
characters.description: AblahBiographical informationBornBefore 15th Century(Age 499+)StatusAliveOccupationGranting wishesTitle(s)Genie, Smurfette(byLizzie)SpeciesJinniGenderFemaleAppearancePlayed byRiann SteeleEpisode Count1First seenThere's a World Where Your Dreams Came TrueLast seenThere's a World Where Your Dreams Came True Ablahis ajinniwho appeared in thetenth episodeof thefirst seasonofLegacies. Not much is known about Ablah's past, other than the fact that she was born in servitude and suffering, as all jinn are, and required to grant wishes for five centuries. In her four hundredth and ninety-ninth year of her term, Ablah crossed paths with a true monster and it consumed her. She was sent to a place of total isolation and utter damnation; Malivore, meaning she could not finish her service and be free. There, she wandered, lost and alone, until she was given one final chance to win her freedom. While under her 500 years of servitude, she obeyed her wish grantee but longs to be free from the suffering of her service. She holds a grudge against the monster who sent her to Malivore before she could complete her 500 years of service. She isn't like most of the monsters, as she needs to be given the urn, and also doesn't show much malevolence like the ones before her. She is shown to be selfish as she doesn't care if the three keys are unlocked, but later on shown some sympathy. She is crafty in terms of how the wish is being granted, but is also honest in telling the grantee to be specific and watch their words carefully. She was also honest in telling Lizzie about what happened to her and for coming to get the urn. She did, however, show some remorse when telling Lizzie that with the memories of her wishes and what she learned will be gone, she will slowly go mad. She was surprised and thankful for Lizzie wishing her freedom.

characters.name: Deputy Adams
characters.description: Deputy AdamsBiographical informationBorn20th Century(Age Unknown)StatusDeceasedOccupationPolice OfficerVampire HunterSpeciesHumanGenderMaleSupernatural informationCause of deathHead TraumaKilled byStefan SalvatorePhysical appearanceHair colorBrownEye colorBrownAppearancePlayed byLex ShontzEpisode Count1First seenGrowing PainsLast seenGrowing PainsDeputy Adamswas ahumanwho appeared in thefirst episodeof thefourth seasonofThe Vampire Diaries. He was a police officer who worked with theTown Councilto search the town for vampires and bring them toPastor Young's ranch. He was killed by Stefan through head trauma soElenacould feed on his blood and complete her transition. InGrowing Pains, he accompaniesPastor Youngand two other police officers to thehospitalto search around the building for vampires. He comes acrossMatt Donovan's room and quickly looks around, not knowingCarolinehad been in the room. Later, at the pastor's ranch, he comes into the barn where Stefan is making noise and threatens him with vervain. Stefan tells him Elena is innocent and will die, but Adams tells him it's not his problem and walks away. After Stefan lunges at the bars, Adams fires two shots into Stefan and goes back outside. Not long after this, Rebekah gets him back in and offers him money, castles, etc., to let her out, but he states he'd rather watch her die, and she vamps out, scaring him near Stefan's cell, who grabs Adams and bashes his head until blood starts slowly coming out, which Elena uses to complete her transition into a vampire. He had a generally quiet demeanor, but takes his job seriously while hunting for vampires in the town. He is shown to be rather callous to vampires as he didn't care if Elena would die while she was in transition, stating that it wasn't his problem.
characters.personality_section: He had a generally quiet demeanor, but takes his job seriously while hunting for vampires in the town. He is shown to be rather callous to vampires as he didn't care if Elena would die while she was in transition, stating that it wasn't his problem.

characters.name: Adrian
characters.description: AdrianBiographical informationBorn20th Century(Age Unknown)TurnedByNiklaus Mikaelsonin 2010StatusDeceasedOccupationMember ofKlaus' Pack(Formerly)Member ofTyler's PackSpeciesWerewolf(Triggered/Originally)Hybrid(Werewolf,Vampire) (Niklaus' bloodline)Ghost(Formerly)GenderMaleSupernatural informationSignificant killsUnknown(first kill)Cause of deathBroken Neck(as a werewolf)Heart Extraction(as a hybrid)Killed byNiklaus Mikaelson(both times)Physical appearanceHeight6'1"Hair colorBlackEye colorBrownAppearancePlayed byMicah Joe ParkerEpisode Count3First seenWe'll Always Have Bourbon StreetLast seenGraduation Adrianwas a character who first appeared in theeighth episodeof thefourth seasoninThe Vampire Diaries. He was originally awerewolf, untilKlausturned him into ahybrid. He broke the sire bond with the help ofTylerandHayley. He was killed by Klaus after he ripped his heart out. Little is known about his early life. Adrian was loyal, shy, and sometimes frightened. Adrian was an immature hybrid in comparison with others. He was loyal to Tyler and manipulated by Hayley, but in the end, he was the first of the twelve hybrids killed by Klaus.
characters.personality_section: Adrian was loyal, shy, and sometimes frightened. Adrian was an immature hybrid in comparison with others. He was loyal to Tyler and manipulated by Hayley, but in the end, he was the first of the twelve hybrids killed by Klaus.

characters.name: Agnes
characters.description: AgnesBiographical informationBorn20th Century(New Orleans, Age Unknown)StatusDeceased(FoundPeace[1])OccupationFortune teller(Formerly)Elderof theFrench Quarter CovenMember ofThe Ancestors(Formerly)SpeciesWitchAncestral Spirit(Formerly)GenderFemaleSupernatural informationSignificant spellsInsanity Hex(onSean O'Connell)Significant killsMonique Deveraux(First Time)Sean O'Connell(Indirectly)Nine seminary students(Indirectly)Cause of deathBroken NeckKilled byElijah MikaelsonPhysical appearanceHair colorBrownEye colorBrownAppearancePlayed byKaren Kaia LiversEpisode Count7(TO)1(TVD)8(totaled)First seenThe Originals(TVD)Always and Forever(TO)Last seenThe Originals(TVD)Fruit of the Poisoned Tree(TO)Phantomesque(Archive Footage)(TO) Agneswas awitchwho first appeared in thetwentieth episodeof thefourth seasonofThe Vampire Diaries. She became the last livingElderof theFrench Quarter Covento completethe Harvest Ritualuntil she was killed byElijah Mikaelson. To the tourists of New Orleans, she was just simple fortune teller. Agnes was one of the witches who lived in theFrench Quarterand practicedAncestral Magic. She believed in the Harvest, and, was anElderof the French Quarter Coven. Agnes was also present atSophie Deveraux's birth. Agnes was a highly zealous woman who wished to destroy Klaus' unborn child. She would often refer to the child as a "devil child", disregarding the fact that Sabine's visions were always open to interpretation, willing to kill an innocent child, based on what she may become in the future, She was extremely immoral, as shown when she hexed Sean to slaughter a whole congregation and then himself. She showed no remorse or guilt over this action, displaying a psychopathic demeanor. Her loyalties stood with mostly the New Orleanswitches, but it can be argued that her loyalties were only to herself being she betrayed afellow coven witchto further her own goals.
